entries.source: "Help me prepare for finals"
entries.value: "Bantu saya bersedia untuk peperiksaan akhir"

entries.source: "Make a JEE revision schedule"
entries.value: "Jadikan a JEE revision schedule"

entries.source: "Plan 2 weeks for biology"
entries.value: "Rancang 2 minggu untuk biologi"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Exam Prep Planner on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan di inspir bagi pembelajaran planning, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner For Realistic Study Schedules is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Build a realistic exam plan from your date, syllabus, strengths, and weak areas.
entries.value: AI Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan Untuk Realistik Belajar Schedules ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Bina realistik exam plan daripada anda date, syllabus, strengths, dan lemah areas.

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner Study Schedule Guide
entries.value: Panduan Jadual Belajar AI Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Exam Prep Planner
entries.value: Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Plan review.
entries.value: Plan ulang kaji.

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Perancangan

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritize topik.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Exam Prep Planner. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Flashcard Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Pembina Kad Imbas. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Students who need a plan that balances revision, practice, confidence, and real life.
entries.value: Pelajar yang memerlukan pelan yang mengimbangkan ulangkaji, latihan, keyakinan dan kehidupan sebenar.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Perancang ini mengutamakan bidang kelemahan, menambah pusingan ulangkaji dan mencipta pelan sandaran untuk hari yang terlepas.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Track risk areas.
entries.value: Jejaki kawasan risiko.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
